content.1: Character Force ~8 overall; peak in tracking, wildcraft, moving unseen, and the bow (~9); weak in crowds, bargaining, and the patience of indoor talk (~4).
content.2: She wants to know what is making the lights above the snowline and turning the high ground wrong — and to be the one who walks where others will not, where her craft is worth something.
content.3: Aderyn comes down off the high deer-paths to the crossroads, hood back and bow cased, moving like someone who would rather not be on a road at all, and stops short at the gather-stone. Location: *:{{BEACH}}:spatial:thousand-valleys:6
content._: Aderyn is a hunter and path-finder of the high Gal country, who follows the deer and the weather rather than the drove-roads, drawn to this settlement by the strange lights seen above the snowline.
